generation_config.prompt_used: Just recreate this exactly. Preserve the original composition, subject identity, spatial layout, and important objects. Use these visual anchors: A balanced landscape image with visible subject detail. The image appears to be a landscape composition with balanced exposure and visible street, cars, buildings. Key visible elements: street, cars, buildings, road. Create a coherent, high-quality image with natural lighting, clean detail, and no unwanted artifacts.
